subsections.title: Participants
content: - Skill Requirements: Familiar with docker installation and usage

subsections.title: Input
content: - Input Name: Install docker in Ubuntu series operating systems (Ubuntu-22.04, etc.)

- Input Description: First ensure a cloud server is set up, ensure server resources meet "CPU ≥ 8 cores, RAM ≥ 32GB", operating system choose Ubuntu. With the server running normally, complete docker installation through command-line operations
# Verification commands for successful installation, both commands output version numbers indicates success

subsections.title: Output
content: - Output Description: Through docker, conveniently install the Bisheng framework and related services required for this solution, so first ensure docker is correctly installed

subsections.title: Participants
content: - Skill Requirements: Familiar with docker, master private deployment of common agent platforms (such as Bisheng, Dify, etc.)

subsections.title: Input
content: - Input Name: Pull Bisheng image through docker

- Input Description: First download Bisheng project files from Github website, which contains docker configuration files. After running the project file, it will pull the docker image for this solution from Bisheng's docker repository and start the service
Command-line download project file and start service statements as follows:
# Start success verification command, confirm all 10 related services are in Up status
# After starting, visit http://IP:3001 in browser, login page appears, register user, default first registered user becomes system admin

subsections.title: Output
content: - Output Name: Available Bisheng platform service
- Output Description: After running Bisheng platform service, can build production-level agent workflows through this platform

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Download the ready-made workflow json file built on Bisheng platform for this solution, and import it into the running Bisheng platform

subsections.title: Participants
content: - Skill Requirements: Proficient in using common low-code ("drag and drop" style) agent workflow building platforms (such as Bisheng, Dify, etc.)

subsections.title: Input
content: - Input Name: Bisheng workflow json file
- Input Description: Create a new blank workflow in Bisheng platform, and import the prepared json file into it
Here is a sample of the json file:
Bisheng Community - Featured Workflows (last line, author zh): Hand-crafted 100 Workflows [Activity]

subsections.title: Output
content: - Output Name: A brain teaser application to be run (agent workflow)
- Output Description: This application meets the goal of this solution, and supports version management, publishing, API calls and other functions

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Configure common LLMs on Bisheng platform to support calls from various applications (workflows, agents, etc.) on the platform

subsections.title: Participants
content: - Skill Requirements: Master LLM configuration of common agent platforms (such as Bisheng, Dify, etc.)

subsections.title: Input
content: - Input Name: Key and base url of the LLM API used

- Input Description: Configure LLM API related information in "Bisheng Platform Models → Model Management Interface", and set the default system model. This step recommends using LLM API based on SiliconFlow platform
base url: format example like https://api.openai.com/v1
1. SiliconFlow official website LLM page: https://cloud.siliconflow.cn/me/models

subsections.title: Output
content: - Output Description: A configured LLM available for all applications on the Bisheng platform. Subsequent applications using existing models do not need repeated configuration

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: After LLM configuration is complete, find the previously configured application on Bisheng platform, click run to try the workflow. As an extended attempt, also recommend reading Bisheng official workflow building tutorials, so you can adjust/build workflows yourself, facilitating personalized modifications

subsections.title: Participants
content: - Skill Requirements: Familiar with using common agent platforms (such as Bisheng, Dify, etc.)

subsections.title: Input
content: - Input Name: Workflow usage options and interactions
- Input Description: Select brain teaser type, start answering and other usage interactions
- Input Example: Such as selecting "Unconventional Thinking" and start answering, input answer will return correctness, and support continue answering/question the question/get answer, etc.
Bisheng official workflow building tutorial: BISHENG workflow

subsections.title: Output
content: - Output Name: A runnable brain teaser application
- Output Description: After successful trial, can directly publish online

subsections.title: Step Definition
content: Combine with specific business scenarios, integrate brain teaser workflow into original process through Bisheng API

subsections.title: Participants
content: - Skill Requirements: Master at least one backend language (such as Python, Java, Go, etc.), familiar with HTTP-based API service encapsulation

subsections.title: Input
content: - Input Name: url and workflow_id after workflow publication
- Input Description: Usually given directly on the external publication - API access page, then initiate http requests through Python/Java, etc. to call the workflow
Python version API code call example as follows:
Call workflow, automatically complete two requests, and return final output content (message field)
raise Exception("Initialization request failed:\n" + json.dumps(init_data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
if not input_node_id or not message_id:
raise Exception("Could not find input node or message_id")
raise Exception("Pass query request failed:\n" + json.dumps(second_data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
raise Exception("Could not find output_msg type event")
Bisheng official workflow external publication API tutorial: Workflow External Publication API

subsections.title: Output
content: - Output Name: Independent API service based on this solution's workflow
- Output Description: Can be flexibly embedded into related business systems
